objective: Build configuration lacks zvkned crypto extension flag. AES_encrypt T-table implementation runs pure scalar. OpenSSL's existing vector crypto AES assembly (aes-riscv64-zvkned.pl) is never selected because the compiler and runtime dispatch cannot detect zvkned capability.

changes.rationale: Build configuration lacks zvkned crypto extension flag. AES_encrypt T-table implementation runs pure scalar. OpenSSL's existing vector crypto AES assembly (aes-riscv64-zvkned.pl) is never selected because the compiler and runtime dispatch cannot detect zvkned capability.
instructions: 做出最小的、保持行为不变的性能修复，以解决 RootCauseBlueprint 指出的根因。
避免无关重构和格式噪音。

expectedDiffSummary: 候选补丁应通过聚焦修改 Configurations/10-main.conf 来解决 blueprint diag-20260610-002。
